name: cosmos-cosmic-adventure-2026
description: Cosmos Cosmic Adventure 2026 — mobile-first hypnotische rhythm-trip. Geen game. Geen score. De track is de game.

scripts.build: npm run updates:build && tsc --noEmit && vite build && node scripts/postbuild-rewrite-paths.mjs && node scripts/postbuild-copy-public.mjs
scripts.predeploy: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
